Sage Bot Item Code: A169


Other locations the gear can be found
Donkey
Solar Compass

Triggers: Once in a while

Power of a Thousand Suns
2 random enemies start incinerating by the Power of a Thousand Suns for 3 sec. The units take 48000 pure damage every second for 3 sec, and all enemies in a small radius around the incinerated units take pure damage equal to 65% of the damage taken by the original targets. Also, the owner of the artifact enhances the closest and furthest allies. Their physical and magic armor increases by 30% for 5 sec. They also restore 20% of their max health, and all allies in a small radius around them restore 50% of the original target's restored health. When the incineration ends, the targets of the ability are weakened. Their max health, fortitude, as well as physical and magic armor are reduced by 30% for 3 sec.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet
